channel.title: PolicyBot Blog
channel.description: Guides on privacy policies, terms of service, GDPR, CCPA, and legal compliance for apps and websites.

item.title: Why Every Website Needs a Privacy Policy in 2026
item.description: In today's digital age, data privacy is more critical than ever. As we move into 2026, the importance of having a robust privacy policy for your website cannot ...

item.title: GDPR vs CCPA: What Small Business Owners Need to Know
item.description: In today’s digital age, protecting user data and maintaining privacy is not just a legal obligation but a necessity for building trust with your customers. Whet...

item.title: Privacy Policy Mistakes That Can Get You Fined
item.description: In today’s digital age, privacy policies are more than just a formality—they are a legal necessity. As a small business owner, indie hacker, or app developer, y...

item.title: How to Handle Childrens Data Under COPPA
item.description: As a small business owner, indie hacker, or app developer, you might be excited about the opportunity to connect with younger audiences. However, if your pla...
